title: Durably checkpoint versioned JSON-column migrations
prompt: The JSON-column migrator upgrades each document according to its own `_schemaVersion` and quarantines malformed documents while continuing the scan. It also records a checkpoint after each configured group of rows. However, a storage failure after a checkpoint currently rolls back every earlier migration in the invocation because checkpointed groups are not committed independently. Fix the transaction handling so each checkpoint is durable and a later failure rolls back only the rows since the most recent checkpoint. Preserve the existing per-document version migrations, unknown JSON fields, malformed-row isolation, and public API. Do not modify the protected tests. Run `bash test.sh`; verification must remain offline and deterministic.
